notes: Saudi Arabia's national data and AI authority. See also registry/control/sa/gov/sdaia.json for its AI ethics/governance guidance.

data.official_name: Personal Data Protection Law (Royal Decree M/19)
data.notes: Enacted 2021, amended 2023, effective September 2023. Saudi Arabia's first comprehensive data-protection law, enforced via SDAIA's National Data Governance Platform.
